unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.message: We hit a glitch. Please try again in a moment.

network.title: Connection lost
network.message: Please check your internet and try again.

server.title: Server issues
server.message: We're having some trouble on our end, but we're on it.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The link might be broken, or the page was moved.

unauthorized.title: Sign in required
unauthorized.message: Please log in to access this page.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to view this content.

validation.title: Check your input
validation.message: Some information looks incorrect. Please review it.

rateLimit.title: Slow down a bit
rateLimit.message: Please wait a moment before trying again.

client.title: Bad request
client.message: The app sent invalid data. Try restarting it.
